11-03-04-10-28

S1006280

Dr Thomas Mirow

President of the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development

20/12/2011

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

TO THE AGREEMENT ESTABLISHING THE EUROPEAN BANK FOR

RECONSTRUCTION AND DEVELOPMENT

The Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan hereby accedes, in accordance with its law, to the 1990

Agreement Establshing the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development, in force as of 28 March 1991, and as further amended on 15 October 2006.

The Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan accepts all conditions for its membership to the EBRD as set out in the Rosolution No. 142 on "Membership of Jordan to the EBRD" adopted by the EBRD Board of Governors on the 10th of November 2011.

The Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan confirms that it has taken all necessary steps, in accordance with its law, to enable it to carry out its obligations under the Agreement and

Resolution, and undertakes to provide any information concerning those steps as the Bank may request.

The Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan further undertakes that it will furnish evidence satisfactory to the Bank that this Instrument has been duly executed and deposited in accordance with its constitutional and legal requirements.

visiter rathe

Affairs

Nasser Judeh

Prai, tire
